app/layout.tsx: Root layout with Geist + Space Grotesk fonts, Vercel Analytics, Speed Insights, and PWA manifest link.
app/globals.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles, custom scrollbar, and base theme variables.
app/login/page.tsx: Login page with email/password auth and 4-step OTP-based password reset flow using Supabase Auth.
app/dashboard/page.tsx: Main dashboard showing total card limits, available balance, billing cycle countdown, per-user cash/due stats, and a single-card filter selector.
app/dashboard/analytics.tsx: Analytics sub-component rendered inside dashboard — shows per-user cash transactions, due transactions, and spending breakdowns.
app/dashboard/qrs.tsx: QR vault sub-component rendered inside dashboard — lists QR codes with cooldown state and allows initiating a rotation payment.
app/transactions/page.tsx: Full transaction ledger with multi-card checkbox filter, timeline grouping, and modal for recording rotations, personal spends, and bill payments with non-blocking WhatsApp alerts.
app/transactions/WaAlert.tsx: Helper module with AlertParams interface and buildMetaComponents function for constructing Meta API components arrays — partially used.
app/settlements/page.tsx: Settlements hub with QR vault tab (via QRTab), pending In Transit list, and settlement modal that broadcasts rotation_settlement_alert via Meta components format.
app/settlements/qr.tsx: QR vault tab component — shows QR grid with cooldown timers, handles markQrAsUsedToday which sends instant rotation_withdraw_alert and scheduled QStash qr_cooling_period_alert.
app/lents/page.tsx: Personal loans tracking page — create lent records, track partial repayments, view history with WhatsApp alerts on issue and recovery.
app/lents/WaAlert.tsx: Separated WhatsApp alert functions for lents — sendLentIssueAlert and sendLentRecoveryAlert using sendWhatsAppAlert helper.
app/settings/page.tsx: Settings page — edit own profile (name, phone, avatar), manage cards (add/edit primary and sub-cards), manage team profiles.
app/test-settle/page.tsx: Test version of settlements page — fires WhatsApp alerts using components format but does NOT write to the database.
app/test-settle/qr.tsx: Test version of QR tab — fires instant + QStash WhatsApp alerts with 1-minute delay instead of 24h5m.
app/test-lents/page.tsx: Test version of lents page — uses same WaAlert logic from lents folder but skips database writes.
app/test-trans/page.tsx: Test version of transactions page — fires WhatsApp alerts and shows optimistic UI but skips database inserts.
app/api/send-whatsapp/route.ts: Next.js API route — proxies WhatsApp template messages to Meta Graph API v18.0, accepts either components[] array or variables{} object (auto-converted to body component).
app/api/internal/agent/apply-patch/route: Internal API route secured by HUB_SECRET — writes full file content to disk, used by external AI Hub agent.
Internal API route secured by HUB_SECRET — recursively lists all project files excluding node_modules and build artifacts.
app/api/internal/agent/project-memory/ro: Internal API route secured by HUB_SECRET — reads and returns all .agendevai/ memory files as JSON.
app/api/internal/agent/read-file/route.t: Internal API route secured by HUB_SECRET — reads and returns the content of any project file by path.
components/BottomNav.tsx: Fixed bottom navigation bar with 4 tabs: Home (/dashboard), Trans (/transactions), Settled (/settlements), Loans (/lents).
components/ui/button.tsx: shadcn Button component with variant and size props.
components/ui/dialog.tsx: shadcn Dialog/Modal component used for all transaction entry, settlement, and settings modals.
components/ui/input.tsx: shadcn Input component used in forms.
components/ui/input-otp.tsx: shadcn OTP input component — used in login page password reset flow.
components/ui/switch.tsx: shadcn Switch toggle component — used in settings and transaction form options.
lib/supabase.ts: Exports a single Supabase browser client using createBrowserClient from @supabase/ssr — cookie-based session for middleware compatibility.
lib/whatsapp.ts: sendWhatsAppAlert helper — wraps fetch to /api/send-whatsapp, auto-detects whether argument is components array or variables object.
lib/utils.ts: cn() utility function — merges Tailwind classes using clsx + tailwind-merge.
store/cardStore.ts: Zustand persisted store — globalSelectedCardIds string array (default ['all']) shared across transactions, settlements, and dashboard pages.
store/index.ts: Zustand store for sidebarOpen toggle state — currently unused in the active UI.
proxy.ts: Next.js 16 auth middleware (must be named proxy.ts with named export 'proxy') — checks Supabase session via createServerClient and redirects unauthenticated requests to /login.
next.config.ts: Next.js config — enables PWA via @ducanh2912/next-pwa, sets allowed Replit dev origins, configures Supabase storage remote image patterns.
